programs.title: Auto China: Driving future of mobility
programs.desc: Auto China 2026 opens on April 24, showcasing nearly 1,500 vehicles over 10 days – at a pivotal turning point for China's automotive industry. Amid commodity volatility and fractured supply chains, electrification is no longer a question of “if” but “how fast.”\nAs the world’s largest electric vehicle (EV) market and a major force of global EV sales, how is China shaping the pace and direction of this charge towards greener, smarter vehicles?\nJoin us on BizTalk this week as we explore how China and Germany are moving in step toward the next phase of the future of mobility.
